name: Event Timeline App Visual Redesign - iOS Journal Latest Message Emphasis v28
basedOn: v27 iOS Journal Topic Text Width
note: This is a Figma reconstruction handoff file, not a native .fig source. This version separates hierarchy between the following direction and the latest node message. The direction text is secondary, while the latest node message uses stronger weight and a soft highlight. Their text starts align exactly, and the date remains aligned to the latest node row. It preserves v27 layout, recommendation swipe behavior, copy, business rules, and semantic colors.

topicCard.dateAlignment: same row as latest-update summary box, measured after layout
topicCard.directionText: secondary, lighter color and lower weight
topicCard.latestNodeMessage: primary, stronger weight with soft highlight
topicCard.textAlignment: direction text and latest node message share the same left text start
